{{- /* Grouped documentation sidebar, built entirely from .Site.Pages. Section order is curated; the page list inside each section is data- driven (where/sortBy over nav_section + nav_weight). Hidden on the home page. */ -}} {{- define "navGroup" -}} {{- $pages := sortBy (where .Site.Pages "nav_section" .Section) "nav_weight" -}} {{- if $pages}}

{{.Section}}

    {{- range $pages}}
  • {{.Envelope.title}}
    • {{- end}}
{{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{- if ne .Page.Layout "home"}}
{{template "navGroup" (dict "Site" .Site "BaseURL" .Site.BaseURL "Current" .Page.URL "Section" "Getting Started")}} {{template "navGroup" (dict "Site" .Site "BaseURL" .Site.BaseURL "Current" .Page.URL "Section" "Concepts")}} {{template "navGroup" (dict "Site" .Site "BaseURL" .Site.BaseURL "Current" .Page.URL "Section" "Guides")}} {{template "navGroup" (dict "Site" .Site "BaseURL" .Site.BaseURL "Current" .Page.URL "Section" "Reference")}}
{{- end}}
